name: anime-db-bridge
description: Chrome extension connecting Bahamut Anime titles to anime database entries.

scripts.check: node --check background.js && node --check content-gamer.js && node --check content-database.js && node --check content-streaming.js && node --check lib/local-ai.js && node --check lib/matcher.js && node --check lib/streaming-adapters.js && node --check lib/ui.js && npm test
